# PERF-024 negative: hasher hoisted, reset per iteration
lang: go
file: PERF-024-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/sha256"
	"encoding/hex"
)

func HashAll(values [][]byte) []string {
	h := sha256.New()
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, v := range values {
		h.Reset()
		h.Write(v)
		out = append(out, hex.EncodeToString(h.Sum(nil)))
	}
	return out
}
